26: resource "aws_kms_key" "data" {
27:   description             = "${local.name_prefix} data encryption (EBS, RDS, ElastiCache, S3)"
28:   deletion_window_in_days = var.deletion_window_in_days
29:   enable_key_rotation     = var.enable_key_rotation
30:   multi_region            = false
31: 
32:   policy = jsonencode({
33:     Version = "2012-10-17"
34:     Statement = [
35:       {
36:         Sid    = "RootAccountFullAccess"
37:         Effect = "Allow"
38:         Principal = {
39:           AWS = "arn:aws:iam::${data.aws_caller_identity.current.account_id}:root"
40:         }
41:         Action   = "kms:*"
42:         Resource = "*"
43:       },
44:       {
45:         Sid    = "AllowEBSService"
46:         Effect = "Allow"
47:         Principal = {
48:           AWS = "*"
49:         }
50:         Action = [
51:           "kms:Encrypt",
52:           "kms:Decrypt",
53:           "kms:ReEncrypt*",
54:           "kms:GenerateDataKey*",
55:           "kms:CreateGrant",
56:           "kms:DescribeKey"
57:         ]
58:         Resource = "*"
59:         Condition = {
60:           StringEquals = {
61:             "kms:ViaService" = [
62:               "ec2.${data.aws_region.current.name}.amazonaws.com",

64:               "elasticache.${data.aws_region.current.name}.amazonaws.com",
